title: NURSE CALLS — Eva freezes again
prompt: Tight close-up in @dentist-waiting-room on @Eva's face — she's mid-laugh, foam-of-fun still on her face, then a kind off-screen voice calls her name. Eva's smile drops in slow motion, her face goes pale, eyes widen, her shoulders pull up to her ears. Off-screen kind female voice (the nurse, only audio, no body in frame): "Eva? We're ready for you, sweetheart." Eva (frozen, small panicked whisper): "...is it… my turn?" Eva (looks down at her own hand reaching for Sara off-frame): "Sara?" Solo shot — only Eva's face and shoulders visible, no other people in frame, no other faces.
